title: tetragonolobus maritimus var. hirsutus
intro: Tetragonolobus maritimus var. hirsutus, also known as the hairy horse bean or hirsute horse bean, is a plant species within the Fabaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Tetragonolobus maritimus var. hirsutus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and decoctions, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
